quick_skim.title: Spectral Gating via Damped Oscillations for Adaptive Implicit Neural Representations
quick_skim.abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have been proven successful in encoding continuous signals through coordinate-based networks, yet facing a spectral dilemma: periodic activations capture fine details but act as all-pass filters that memorise noise, while spatially compact activations regularise effectively but suffer from low-frequency bias. Existing attempts to resolve this trade-off introduce computational overhead or tuning frailty. We propose to model each neuron's activation as the steady-state response of a sinusoidally-forced damped harmonic oscillator, whose amplitude naturally governs the network's spectral selectivity during training. By jointly optimising the oscillator parameters alongside the network weights, our method adapts to the target signal's spectral content without explicit regularisation. Initialised in the stopband, the network exhibits a coarse-to-fine learning curriculum that progressively expands its spectral gate, capturing low-frequency structures first and high-frequency details only when justified by the reconstruction objective. Comprehensive experiments show that our approach consistently achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results against established INRs, while requiring no task-specific tuning of any hyperparameters.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Novel activation function for implicit neural representations based on damped oscillations
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于阻尼振荡的隐式神经表示新型激活函数
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于阻尼振荡的隐式神经表示新型激活函数
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于阻尼振荡的隐式神经表示新型激活函数
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Spectral gating via damped oscillations proposes a novel neuron activation that acts as a frequency-selective filter, enabling adaptive implicit neural representations that balance fine details and regularization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 隐式神经表示面临频谱困境：周期性激活能捕捉细节但易过拟合，紧凑激活正则化好但低频偏置。本文提出将神经元激活建模为受迫阻尼谐振子的稳态响应，通过优化振荡器参数实现自适应的频谱选择性。实验表明，该方法在信号表示任务中平衡了细节保留与正则化，为通信信道建模等连续信号处理提供了新型神经网络构件。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 隐式神经表示面临频谱困境：周期性激活能捕捉细节但易过拟合，紧凑激活正则化好但低频偏置。本文提出将神经元激活建模为受迫阻尼谐振子的稳态响应，通过优化振荡器参数实现自适应的频谱选择性。实验表明，该方法在信号表示任务中平衡了细节保留与正则化，为通信信道建模等连续信号处理提供了新型神经网络构件。

quick_skim.title: Neural Network Quantization by Learning Low-Loss Subspaces
quick_skim.abstract: Neural network quantization aims to find a discrete representation of parameters that preserves the performance of a full-precision (FP) model as faithfully as possible. Enforcing discrete constraints perturbs parameters away from a well-optimized minimum, generally resulting in performance degradation. Recent studies indicate that low-loss FP solutions are not isolated, but instead belong to connected low-loss subspaces of the loss landscape, where the loss maintains nearly the same minimum value. Models sampled from these subspaces are diverse and retain high accuracy. This raises the question: can a quantized model be constructed to lie within a low-loss subspace of the FP model, thereby automatically preserving performance? We address this question by learning quantization-aware linear paths in weight space optimized to minimize loss. We demonstrate that the midpoint of the resulting subspace is, by design, quantization-friendly and that its direct quantization yields performance comparable to that of quantization-aware training. The proposed procedure offers a novel perspective on weight quantization and, in contrast to conventional methods, neither relies on the straight-through estimator nor involves explicit discretization during training.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Neural network quantization for efficient inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 神经网络量化以实现高效推理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 神经网络量化以实现高效推理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 神经网络量化以实现高效推理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Neural network quantization by learning low-loss subspaces. The method ensures quantized models lie within low-loss subspaces of full-precision models, preserving accuracy while reducing model size.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 神经网络量化旨在降低模型存储与计算成本，但通常导致性能下降。本文提出通过学习全精度模型的低损失子空间来构建量化模型，使得量化参数自动处于最小损失区域。实验表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著减小模型尺寸，为通信系统等资源受限场景提供高效的模型压缩方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 神经网络量化旨在降低模型存储与计算成本，但通常导致性能下降。本文提出通过学习全精度模型的低损失子空间来构建量化模型，使得量化参数自动处于最小损失区域。实验表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著减小模型尺寸，为通信系统等资源受限场景提供高效的模型压缩方案。
